race.description: Breathe Accounting John Higgins Memorial Heat 2 Ms Pace
race.comment: AMERICAN BLAZE NZ (11) is back today after a layoff of six months. Closed the last prep in great style with a win by 1.1 metres over 2185m at Pinjarra. No favours expected from this draw but will have plenty of admirers. IDEAL INTEREST (1) finished third last start, beaten 5 metres at Gloucester Park over 2130m. Expected to run well from the pegs. MAJOR DISCO (3) should be ready to peak now after finishing third over 2130m at Gloucester Park eight days ago. Expect him to give this a real shake. FROM TIGERLAND (2) finished fourth at Pinjarra last time. Consistent and deserves some respect from the low draw.
